title: horminum niloticum
intro: Horminum niloticum, also known as Egyptian lavender or Nilotic lavender, is a flowering plant native to Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and calming effects. The plant's essential oil is also known for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. Horminum niloticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine, including calming and soothing skin irritations.
